name: HMS Lord Stonehaven (FY 187)
events: 27 Jul 1942 HMS Rorqual (Lt. L.W. Napier, RN) departed Plymouth for Gibraltar. She was escorted by HMS Lord Stonehaven (Skr. A.F.S. Jenner, RNR) until 0015/28.
For the daily positions of HMS Rorqual during this patrol see the map below.
21 Sep 1942 HMS Unbeaten (Lt. D.E.O. Watson, DSC, RN) departed Portsmouth for Plymouth. She was escorted by HMS Lord Stonehaven (Skr. A.F.S. Jenner, RNR). (2)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
